title: prompt-atoms v1 atom
description: A single atom in the prompt-atoms catalog. Discriminated by the top-level `type` field; one of: persona, constraint, format-instruction, tool-use-template, refusal-pattern, output-schema.

id.description: URL-safe slug; unique within the atom's type.

vendors.description: LLM families this atom is known to work well with. 'any' means vendor-agnostic.

content.description: The prompt fragment itself. For atoms with structured content (output-schema, tool-use-template), use the schema or template form; the renderer assembles it into a prompt turn. Empty string ('') is valid for stub/none atoms.

applicable_turns.description: Which turns this atom legally appears in. Defaults to ['system'] for persona/constraint/format-instruction/refusal-pattern; ['tool'] for tool-use-template; ['system','assistant'] for output-schema.

see_also.description: Sibling atoms commonly composed with this one.

persona_ref.description: Reference to a base persona atom. Format: <catalog>/persona/<slug>.
